exam.name: Terraform Authoring and Operations Professional
exam.delivery: browser remote workstation with proctor release

stages.name: pre_exam_survey
stages.recommended_action: answer employment or partner question quickly

stages.name: multiple_choice_questions
stages.recommended_action: answer from memory, flag uncertain questions, avoid spending lab time in docs

stages.name: lab_scenarios
stages.recommended_action: open scenario links, implement exact task requirements, run validation commands

stages.name: post_exam_survey
stages.recommended_action: complete final survey and submit exam

resource_policy.name: HashiCorp Terraform documentation
resource_policy.note: official documentation is expected to be available

resource_policy.name: Provider documentation
resource_policy.note: scenario links can point to provider resources

resource_policy.name: HashiCorp tutorials
resource_policy.note: tutorial pages can be blocked even if reached from docs

strategy.mcq_tactic: flag uncertain questions and revisit only after labs
